product_name_sources: Google Meet participant display name: 'Getlinked Platform'
Logo monogram 'gl' in green circle on participant avatar tiles
overview.navigation_structure: Left sidebar with collapsible sections; top breadcrumb bar; date-range filter tabs across top of main content area

color_scheme.primary: Dark green (#2d6a4f / forest green) — sidebar, logo, spinner
color_scheme.accent: Green (#52b788) — active states, loading indicator, action buttons
color_scheme.background: light — white main content area, light-grey sidebar

overview.design_style: Enterprise / SaaS — dense data tables, multi-tab date filters, modal permission grids; functional rather than decorative

key_screens.description: The presenter (Alex) is on the Google Meet pre-join screen before entering the demo call. Camera is disabled; options to join or use other methods are visible.
Completely black frame representing a brief transition between the pre-join screen and the Google Meet waiting room.
Alex has joined the call but is waiting for the organizer to admit them. An illustrated waiting screen is shown with a spinner and explanatory text.
notable_ui_elements: Подождите, пока организатор примет ваш запрос.

key_screens.screen_name: Google Meet — Active Call, Cameras Off
key_screens.description: Alex is now admitted to the call. Three participant tiles are visible ('Getlinked Platform' x2, 'Alex') but all cameras are off, showing dark grey tiles. No screen share yet.
notable_ui_elements: screenshare, emoji, reaction, raise-hand, more-options controls

key_screens.screen_name: Google Meet — Active Call with Wi-Fi Menu
key_screens.description: Same active call view as the previous frame but the macOS Wi-Fi menu is open in the top-right corner, showing 'ASUS_AXE' as the connected network — a brief off-task interaction before the demo.

key_screens.screen_name: Google Meet — Active Call with GetLinked Logo Avatars
key_screens.description: Both 'Getlinked Platform' participant tiles now display the branded green avatar with the 'gl' monogram logo. This is the stable in-call state before screen sharing begins, lasting ~45 seconds.
notable_ui_elements: gl monogram logo on dark-green background

key_screens.description: The call grid has reflowed slightly — Getlinked Platform tiles remain with the green 'gl' logo avatar; Alex's tile is partially visible on the right edge. Represents a brief transitional moment before screen sharing.

key_screens.screen_name: Google Meet — Screen Share Active (CRM Dashboard Overview)
key_screens.description: A presenter has started screen sharing the GetLinked CRM. The title bar reads 'Getlinked Platform (Проводится показ с аннотациями.)'. The shared screen shows the CRM Dashboard at a small scale: line chart for Clicks/Applies/Leads/Conversions, System Status panel, and an affiliate data table. This view persists for ~107 seconds.
notable_ui_elements: Clicks, Applies, Leads and Conversions chart
Getlinked Platform avatar tiles on right

key_screens.description: The CRM Dashboard is now shown full-screen (screen share filling the window). The dashboard displays date-range filter tabs, key metric cards (Financials, Clicks, Applies, Leads, Commissions), a multi-line chart, a System Status section, and an affiliate summary table. The left sidebar shows all main navigation sections.
notable_ui_elements: YOUR LOGO HERE powered by link
Today / Yesterday / This Week / Last Week / This Month / Last Month / Custom
Clicks, Applies, Leads and Conversions (line chart)
System Status: Critical, Danger, Admin, OK
Left nav: Dashboards (Main, Task), Affiliates, Advertisers, Finance, Reports, Permissions, Messages, Tools & Settings, Whitelabel, Knowledge Base, Release Notes

key_screens.description: A Cloudflare bot-protection challenge modal has appeared over the CRM interface while navigating to demo-server.getlinked.io. The CRM page (with affiliate data table visible behind the modal) is temporarily blocked pending browser verification.
notable_ui_elements: Checking your browser before accessing demo-server.getlinked.io
This process is automatic. Your browser will redirect to your requested content shortly.
Request Details (IP address, Country code, Request URL, User-Agent)
affiliate data table visible behind modal (Rank, Name: Mary Leann; Name: Crystal Geraldine)

key_screens.description: The CRM Dashboard page is reloading after the Cloudflare check. A green loading spinner is displayed in the centre of the content area. A notification banner at the top warns users to only communicate via official Getlinked support channels. This is the longest-held frame group (~790 seconds) suggesting the dashboard took considerable time to load or the demo paused here.
notable_ui_elements: Attention: Getlinked Support Team communicates ONLY in its Official Chats or Groups. Make sure you are on the right one. (Click here)
Today / Yesterday / This Week / Last Week / This Month / Last Month / Custom tabs

key_screens.screen_name: CRM Permissions — Edit Permissions Modal (Administration, compact view)
key_screens.description: The Permissions section of the CRM is open. A modal dialog 'Edit permissions - Administration' overlays the page, showing a permission matrix with rows of permissions and green Allow / red Deny toggle buttons. The underlying list shows various permission groups.
notable_ui_elements: Add new, Edit, Delete CSV/PDF action buttons

key_screens.screen_name: CRM Permissions — Edit Permissions Modal (Administrators, expanded view)
key_screens.description: The same Permissions section with the 'Edit permissions - Administrators' modal open in a more expanded state, revealing a longer scrollable list of individual permission rows each with Allow/Deny action buttons. This view persists for ~307 seconds as the demonstrator walks through permission settings.
notable_ui_elements: Multiple permission rows with Allow / Deny buttons
Affiliate management, Advertiser, Collaboration, Commissions, Marketing, Payment, Reporting categories visible in background list

key_screens.screen_name: Google Meet — Call End, Back to Avatar View
key_screens.description: The screen sharing has ended and the call returns to the participant tile grid. Both 'Getlinked Platform' tiles show the green 'gl' logo avatar again. A 'Windows App' notification badge is visible on Alex's controls, indicating the call is wrapping up. Time is now 16:57.

overview.summary: This video records a Google Meet demo call in which a representative of 'Getlinked Platform' presents a white-label affiliate/CRM platform to a user named Alex. The core product is hosted at demo.getlinked.io — a CRM and affiliate management system with a white-label logo placeholder, a left-sidebar navigation covering Dashboards, Affiliates, Advertisers, Finance, Reports, Permissions, Messages, Tools & Settings, Whitelabel, and Knowledge Base. The demo focused primarily on the Dashboard (metric cards, a multi-line Clicks/Applies/Leads/Conversions chart, System Status panel, and affiliate data tables) and the Permissions module (a granular Allow/Deny permission matrix for admin roles). The UI is enterprise-grade, data-dense, and English-language, using a dark-green and white color scheme. A Cloudflare security challenge briefly interrupted the demo, and the dashboard experienced a lengthy loading pause (~13 minutes), suggesting the demo environment was running on a shared or slow server.
